user.title: MarineTraffic Tracker
user.description: Choose how to define your vessel tracking area.

data_description.tracking_mode: Radius: track vessels within a circular area centred on a point. Box: track vessels within a geographic bounding box.

radius.title: Radius Tracking Area
radius.description: Drop a pin on the map to set your tracking area centre, then drag the circle edge to set the radius.

data_description.location: Centre point and radius of the circular area to monitor for vessels.

box.title: Bounding Box Tracking Area
box.description: Enter the north/east/south/west boundaries of your tracking area.

source.title: Data Source
source.description: Choose your primary AIS data source, optional additional sources, and an optional fallback source for scraper failures.

data_description.data_source: MarineTraffic and VesselFinder use live-map scraping and may occasionally be blocked or return no vessels. AISHub uses an official API and requires an API key.
data_description.extra_sources: Additional sources are polled alongside the primary source. Results are merged by MMSI and the freshest observation wins. AISHub requires an API key.
data_description.fallback_source: Use this source only when the primary and additional sources return no vessel data. Select 'None' to disable fallback.
data_description.aishub_api_key: Required when AISHub is selected as primary, additional, or fallback source. Obtain a free key by contributing AIS data at https://www.aishub.net/

timing.title: Polling & Cleanup Settings
timing.description: Configure how often vessels are fetched and when stale vessels are removed.

data.exclude_anchored: Exclude Anchored & Moored Vessels from Live Map

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll for vessel data. Minimum 30 s for scrapers (MarineTraffic/VesselFinder); minimum 5 s for AISHub API.
data_description.stale_timeout: A vessel not seen for this long will be removed. Default: 3600 s (1 hour). Max: 86400 s (24 hours).
data_description.filter_vessel_types: Only show vessels of the selected types. Leave empty to show all vessel types.
data_description.exclude_anchored: When enabled, vessels with 'At Anchor' or 'Moored' status are removed from the live map and device tracker entities but still appear in the Vessel Count sensor's anchored_vessels summary attribute. Position history for anchored vessels is always deduplicated to avoid recorder bloat.

error.south_gte_north: South latitude must be strictly less than north latitude.
error.west_gte_east: West longitude must be strictly less than east longitude.
error.aishub_api_key_required: An AISHub API key (username) is required when AISHub is selected as a data source.
error.fallback_same_as_primary: The fallback source must differ from the primary source.

abort.already_configured: This tracking area is already configured.

init.title: Data Source Settings
init.description: Change the primary data source, optional additional sources, fallback behavior, and AISHub API key.

data_description.data_source: MarineTraffic and VesselFinder use live-map scraping. AISHub uses an official API and requires an API key.
data_description.extra_sources: Additional sources are polled alongside the primary source and merged by MMSI. AISHub requires an API key.
data_description.fallback_source: Use this source only when the primary and additional sources return no vessel data.
data_description.aishub_api_key: Required when AISHub is selected as primary, additional, or fallback source.

data.exclude_anchored: Exclude Anchored & Moored Vessels from Live Map

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll for vessel data. Minimum 30 s for scrapers; minimum 5 s for AISHub.
data_description.stale_timeout: A vessel not seen for this long will be removed.
data_description.filter_vessel_types: Only show vessels of the selected types. Leave empty to show all vessel types.
data_description.exclude_anchored: When enabled, vessels with 'At Anchor' or 'Moored' status are removed from the live map and device tracker entities but still appear in the Vessel Count sensor's anchored_vessels summary attribute.

error.aishub_api_key_required: An AISHub API key (username) is required when AISHub is selected as a data source.
error.fallback_same_as_primary: The fallback source must differ from the primary source.
